description: Create a new tracking module for space weather monitoring named 'Space_Weather' using the 'Pittsburgh' ground station. Add the following satellites to the module: SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), METOP-C (NORAD 43689), and GOES 16 (NORAD 41866). Configure the module to use the 'All views narrow' layout and set the Map View ground track length to 3 orbits. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
